name: MCA Inclusive Expressions
description: Core enhancement mod for MCA Reborn (Minecraft Comes Alive) providing dedicated Breast sub-tabs, nested sub-categories ([ Size ], [ Position ], [ Rotation ]), 100% independent 3D left and right breast model part MatrixStack scaling, 6-axis 3D position customization (Left X/Y/Z and Right X/Y/Z), 3-axis 3D Euler rotation control (Pitch X, Yaw Y, Roll Z), direct GUI screen genetics access preview synchronization, GameRule-governed max scale limits, real-time 3D model preview rendering, and gender-inclusive body feature customization.
